backend/main.mo: Main Motoko canister implementing game CRUD and Match Word to Image question storage with tag filtering.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module ensuring the predefined Match Word to Image game exists on upgrade.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence record linking a home-page fix to affected frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Map of frontend file paths to short descriptions for reference or indexing.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind-based theme variables for light and dark mode styling.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML entry point mounting the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes for home, manager, and game launch views.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Shared layout with header navigation, content outlet, and footer.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmDeleteDia: Reusable delete confirmation dialog with loading state.
frontend/src/components/GameCard.tsx: Clickable game card showing thumbnail, description, and tags.
frontend/src/components/GameEditorDialog: Dialog for editing existing games with form handling and mutations.
frontend/src/components/MatchWordToImage: Interactive game component that shuffles questions, loads images, manages option selection, and handles progression and completion states.
Dialog form for creating a new question with image upload, option inputs, validation, and submission via mutation.
Displays all questions with loaded image URLs and highlights the correct option for each.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and logic for loading, storing, and managing Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating games and Match Word to Image questions using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining light/dark theme variables and base styling rules.
frontend/src/lib/assets.ts: Exports static asset paths for the app logo and a placeholder image.
frontend/src/lib/externalBlob.ts: Utility functions to convert between ExternalBlob and File objects and to create image object URLs with a React hook for cleanup.
frontend/src/lib/gameConstants.ts: Defines the static ID and metadata for the Match Word to Image game.
frontend/src/lib/shuffle.ts: Provides Fisher-Yates array shuffle and option shuffling while tracking the correct answer index.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/GameLaunchPage.tsx: Loads a game and its questions, showing loading/error states, and renders Match Word to Image gameplay when applicable.
frontend/src/pages/GameManagerPage.tsx: Displays and manages questions for the Match Word to Image game with creation, loading, and error states.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Fetches and displays the list of available rehab games with loading and error handling.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind theme, colors, animations, typography, and plugins for the frontend.
project_state.json: Stores project metadata, architecture notes, known issues, and feature tracking for the rehab game platform.
